comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.6/OWNERS)~~ [mheon,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I think CI on the 1.6 branch might be having problems. Probably safe to update the images to the latest ones we use for master?
Oh. I think it's just the Fedora 29 tests. Because we stopped testing on F29.
#4670 has a patch to fix CI
#4670 is landed, rebase and CI should go green

> #4670 is landed, rebase and CI should go green

Done :heavy_check_mark:
...It merged? Well, that doesn't seem right.
(Ah well, I was going to merge anyways...)
For sequencing, we're going to cut 1.6.4 first, then 1.7.0 immediately after - so autobuild scripts won't unintentionally obsolete 1.7.0 when the 1.6.4 tag appears
